data_schema: train.csv columns: id(str), text(str, a sentence — MAY CONTAIN COMMAS/QUOTES so use pandas default CSV parser with quoting), author(target: one of EAP, HPL, MWS). sample_submission columns: id,EAP,HPL,MWS (predicted class probabilities per row, summing to ~1).
extra_notes: TEXT classification. Use TF-IDF (word + char n-grams) plus a linear model (LogisticRegression or Multinomial Naive Bayes / SGD with log loss); optionally calibrate probabilities. Metric = multi-class log loss (LOWER is better), so CV_SCORE must be OOF log loss. submission.csv must have columns id,EAP,HPL,MWS with row-wise probabilities. Do NOT use torch/transformers (keep within CPU time budget). Stratify folds by author.
